node.text: Deborah started a project for a community cleanup and is raising funds for it.

node.text: Deborah ran a free gardening class for the community with her neighbor.

node.text: Deborah expressed excitement to hear about Jolene reaching out and helping underprivileged kids.

node.text: Deborah's goal is to keep teaching yoga and supporting her community to help people find peace and joy.

node.text: Deborah supported Jolene's volunteer program idea and suggested that it's a great way to help and inspire others.

node.text: Deborah spent time remembering her mom by visiting her old house and sitting on a bench last Sunday.

node.text: Deborah values supporting others, as seen when she bonded with Anna during a yoga class and shared stories with Jolene.
